title: Glass Terminal Render Flow
interaction_flow: App → GlassTerminal: initGlassTerminal()  [no-op stub, initial setup hook]
App → App: loadContent()  [fetches allCommands from API]
renderDesktopLayout → data.js: reads commandCategories, commandRelationships, betaCommands
renderDesktopLayout → renderDesktopLayout: filter deprecated commands, group+sort by categoryOrder
renderDesktopLayout → DOM: reads window.location.hash to determine startIndex
renderDesktopLayout → GlassTerminal: renderSpread(cmd, i, isActive) × N  [builds spread HTML per command]
renderDesktopLayout → DOM: container.innerHTML = magazine-container + fisheye-list + spreads
initSpreadDemo → DemoRenderer: renderCommandDemo(cmd.id)  [if demoArea not loaded; injects HTML]
setupFisheyeList → DOM: create scroll spacer div, set scroll container height
setupFisheyeList → setupFisheyeList: layout(startIdx)  [positions all items with fisheye scale/opacity]
setupFisheyeList → setupFisheyeList: activate(startIdx)  [sets is-active class, calls goToSpread]
DOM → setupMagazineKeyboard: keydown ArrowRight/Down or ArrowLeft/Up
renderMobileLayout → DOM: container.innerHTML = mobile-commands-layout (carousel pills + demo area + info cards)
key_relationships: GlassTerminal imports data.js: commandCategories, commandRelationships, betaCommands, commandProcessSteps

module_state.currentSplitInstance: module-level ref to active SplitCompare instance (destroyed on spread change)
module_state.currentCommandId: module-level tracking of active command id
module_state.sourceCache: module-level cache for fetched source content (keyed by cmdId)

fisheye_algorithm: Absolute-positioned items; scale=smoothstep(dist, RADIUS=5), MIN_SCALE=0.35; STEP=30px scroll per item; getCenterIndex=scrollTop/STEP; opacity derived from scale
important_notes: initGlassTerminal() is a no-op stub — real init happens in renderTerminalLayout()
Desktop layout: magazine-spread components with fisheye sidebar nav (goToSpread drives spread switching)
Mobile layout: horizontal pill carousel + single demo area (renderCommandDemo + initSplitCompare per selection)
Demos are lazily loaded: demoArea.dataset.loaded guards re-render; split compare always re-inited on activation
URL hash (#cmd-{id}) synced on every goToSpread call; also read on init to restore position
MOBILE_BREAKPOINT = 900px; resize event triggers full re-render when crossing threshold
Keyboard ArrowRight/Down/Left/Up delegates through fisheye _scrollToCommand, not goToSpread directly
